<domain>
## Phase Boundary

Simulation correctness is restored and a scenario pool exists for curriculum training. Covers FIX-01 (extend demand beyond sim end), FIX-02 (truncation handling for FatalTraCIError), DEM-01 (headless CLI for demand generation), DEM-02 (configurable demand parameters), DEM-03 (4 curriculum scenarios), DEM-04 (multimodal demand).

</domain>
